_comment:
Optical-flow sensor calibration. Both stack converters return `.notImplemented` in v1: AP `FLOW_*` and PX4 `SENS_FLOW_*` / `EKF2_OF_*` overlap only on mounting-position params; per-axis scalers, yaw orientation, sensor type, and fusion delay are stack-specific.

Registered for discoverability — Vehicle Inspector lists it; runtime returns a precise 'not implemented in this app version' message.

then.detail: Optical-flow calibration is not implemented in this app version. AP `FLOW_*` and PX4 `SENS_FLOW_*` / `EKF2_OF_*` require a per-stack authoring pass.
Optical-flow calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
